market: 14 recent SEC filing(s) matched the current watchlist in the last 45 days. No brand-new target filing arrived on this refresh, but the latest report was upgraded with primary-filing read-through on the newest/material disclosures.
tech: This panel tracks hard company disclosures, not headlines. The latest refresh reads the primary SEC filing pages and, where needed, the attached exhibit carrying the real disclosure.
risk: Not every 8-K is an operating update: some are compensation or deal-completion disclosures. If a filing could not be fully read, the report says so explicitly.
